policy.allowed_change: An edit must directly close a listed hardening requirement or produce evidence for one.
policy.forbidden_change: No product feature, marketing change, unrelated cleanup, performance refactor, release, tag, or publication is permitted while status is active.
policy.completion_rule: A requirement is complete only when implementation, focused tests, adversarial tests, and authoritative evidence are all recorded.
